blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
